sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71231" key="nuktografi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτο-γρᾰφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71231.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">writing by night,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.634a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">803c</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
